app.title: Utilyze measures how efficiently your GPU is doing useful work
app.author: nateb2022
app.description: A tool that measures how efficiently your GPU is doing useful work.
proposed_tests: Install utilyze and measure GPU utilization on a dummy workload
Run utilyze and compare vs. system report (e.g., nvidia-smi)
Benchmark utilyze performance on a real-world GPU workload
Compare utilyze output to other GPU monitoring tools
